title: anisodontea fruticosa
intro: Anisodontea fruticosa, also known as the bush pink or pink bushwillow, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae. The medicinal properties of Anisodontea fruticosa include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of the plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as acting as a natural diuretic to support kidney function. Anisodontea fruticosa is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
